form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 4th of 7 at Sandown-Lakeside 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1200m, slow going 2.75 len behind Santana carrying 56kg at $4.20. Previously second-up 3rd in a small field at Wyong Mdn-Sw on October 30 over 1625m, 5 len behind Sir Loyne with 55kg at $2.40. Rates highly at best and can improve sharply.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw October 6 over 2000m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Dharam Shalaa carrying 55kg at $1.90. On debut second of 13 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Mdn-Sw September 3 over 1500m, a nose behind Engine Of War carrying 56kg at $26. This is an ideal race to kick off. Promising and a bold return is likely.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old filly by Admire Mars out of Sunday Sassy. At the most recent trial finished sixth at Caulfield Heath over 1000m. Won't be winning but should give a good account.
